response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role demands a Director-level IC (Principal Engineer) with ~15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and strategic advisory ability with cloud/AI. The resume shows roughly 10-12 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI product leadership, no recognized public AI work, and limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK at Optilyz). This is a significant level and domain mismatch.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack engineer across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Founder of open-source GIS platform shows entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: Falls short of the 15-year experience bar for a Principal/Director-level IC
No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Limited evidence of strategic advisory work with cloud/AI customers and partners

key_factors.factor: Experience level vs. Principal/Director IC bar
Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
Emerging MCP / AI-agent tooling work at re:cinq
